case_title: NERISSA C MILLER VS. GINO FURLANI et al.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MILLER, NERISSA C
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, NERISSA C
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-20-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NERISSA C. MILLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GINO FURLANI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALELI FURLANI IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT GAVE A CHECK FOR $400 TO PLAINTIFF. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON AWARDED PLAINTIFF ANOTHER $400 IN LATE FEES (INTEREST ON THE $400 ORGINALLY OWED BUT NOT PAID UNTIL TODAY IN COURT). APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE DEC-20-2019 HEARING IF NO FINAL PAYMENT OF $400 IS MADE. IF NO APPEARNACE AT THE DEC 20TH HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,649.67 FILED BY MILLER, NERISSA C AS TO DEFENDANT FURLANI, GINO FURLANI, ALELI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $0.00 WAIVER SERVED NOV-14-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FURLANI, GINO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED NOV-14-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FURLANI, ALELI
